message:
feat(host): add batch invoke executor with dependency-aware scheduling

Implement batch invoke module for fcp-host enabling agents to execute
multiple tools in a single request with topological ordering, zone
validation, and partial failure semantics.

Key components:
- BatchExecutor: validates, plans, and executes operation batches
- Topological tier planning via Kahn's algorithm (deterministic)
- Zone hierarchy validation (owner > private > work > project > community > public)
- Stop-on-first-error and continue-on-failure execution modes
- Dependency failure propagation (skips dependents of failed ops)
- Per-operation timing and error capture
- JSON serialization for all request/response types

65 unit tests covering validation, planning, execution, zone access,
serialization, edge cases, and cycle detection.

Bead: flywheel_connectors-2b2l

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
